creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 160962
shar file for sysutils/daemonize

daemonize is a command-line utility that runs a command as a Unix daemon. See
the accompanying man page for full details.

WWW: https://github.com/bmc/daemonize


I have attached the shar file, and will upload the poudriere build log shortly.

-Neel
